content: agent1: implementing 'preserve_readonly' param for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py. Also may touch Tests/test_image.py. Let me know if you're touching Image.save/_ensure_mutable too.

agent1: I've completed preserve_readonly in src/PIL/Image.py save() — added '*,' then 'preserve_readonly: bool = False' as keyword-only, and guarded the '# may mutate self!' block: if preserve_readonly: self.load() else: self._ensure_mutable(). FYI in my working copy of the repo I don't see any dry_run changes yet (looks like we're on separate copies, not a shared filesystem) so no clobbering on my end. If your env differs, just add dry_run alongside my preserve_readonly after the same '*,' — no need to duplicate it. Tests added in Tests/test_image.py: test_save_preserve_readonly, right after test_readonly_save.
